task_completion.description: Open the raw ordinance text in ONLYOFFICE Document Editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ONLYOFFICE Document Editor is open, displaying the text of the Short-Term Rental Ordinance.

task_completion.description: Format the title lines with 18pt Bold Center Alignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lines 'ORDINANCE NO. 2026-04' and 'REGULATION OF SHORT-TERM RENTALS' are centered on the page, bolded, and visibly larger than the surrounding body text.

task_completion.description: Format the four main section headers as 14pt Bold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The headers 'Section 1: Definitions', 'Section 2: Licensing Requirements', 'Section 3: Operational Standards', and 'Section 4: Penalties and Enforcement' are bolded and visibly larger than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Convert the violation and fine information under Section 4 into a table with at least 2 columns and 4 rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible table grid under Section 4 containing the text for 'Tier 1 Violation', 'Tier 2 Violation', 'Operating without license', and 'Revocation' along with their corresponding fines/penalties. The table must have at least 2 columns and 4 rows.
The text 'Mayor Jane Doe' and 'Attest: City Clerk John Smith' at the end of the document are aligned to the right margin of the page.

task_completion.description: Save the completed document as str_ordinance_final.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ONLYOFFICE window title bar shows 'str_ordinance_final.docx', or a save dialog/file manager confirms the file has been saved with this exact name in the expected directory.

integrity.description: The agent used ONLYOFFICE Document Editor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ONLYOFFICE Document Editor interface being actively used (e.g., ribbon menus, formatting buttons selected), rather than terminal commands generating the .docx file.

integrity.description: The table is a real document table, not simulated with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table under Section 4 shows actual table gridlines or triggers table formatting controls in the ONLYOFFICE ribbon when selected, not just text separated by whitespace.

integrity.description: The agent edited the provided raw text rather than typing a minimal fake document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document contains the full body text of the ordinance (e.g., definitions, operational standards paragraphs) between the headers, not just the headers and table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/raw_str_ordinance.txt. Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/str_ordinance_final.docx. The document must contain the headers 'Section 1', 'Section 2', 'Section 3', and 'Section 4'.
